case_for: Hopkins showed his ceiling as recently as week 9 with a 28.6-point explosion, proving he can still deliver a league-winning game when targets and a big play come together.
case_against: His floor is alarmingly low and inconsistent, with four of his last six games under 10 points and two of those below 5, suggesting the week 9 outburst was an outlier rather than a trend.
